'''thadïfzïf''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:okero|okero]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''inanimate''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-d-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:okero|okero]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| inanimate
|-
! Citation form
| thadïfzïf
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || thædïfzïfth || thædïfzïfj || thædïfzïfsh || thædïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || thadïfdïfzïfth || thadïfdïfzïfj || thadïfdïfzïfsh || thadïfdïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || thadïfzïfth || thadïfzïfj || thadïfzïfsh || thadïfzïf
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || thadïffzïffth || thadïffzïffj || thadïffzïffsh || thadïffzïff
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for inanimate singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || thadïfzïfïf || thadïfzïfïf || thadïfzïfïf || thadïfzïfïf
|-
| [[Patient]] || thadïfzïfth || thadïfzïfj || thadïfzïfsh || thadïfzïf
|-
| [[Possessive]] || thadïfzïfïfl || thadïfzïfïfl || thadïfzïfïfl || thadïfzïfïfl
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || thadïfzïfïfïf || thadïfzïfïfïf || thadïfzïfïfïf || thadïfzïfïfïf
|-
| [[Dative]] || thadïfzïfïfn || thadïfzïfïfn || thadïfzïfïfn || thadïfzïfïfn
|-
| [[Speaker]] || thadïfzïfïforo || thadïfzïfïforo || thadïfzïfïforo || thadïfzïfïforo
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki inanimate nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
